name: Micro-Captive/Small Insurance Company Election

eligibility.description: Net written premiums must not exceed $2,200,000 (indexed for inflation) and the company must meet specific diversification or ownership requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows small non-life insurance companies to be taxed only on their taxable investment income, effectively excluding underwriting income (premiums) from taxation.
